description: Declarative gate manifest — catalogs every script with tier, blocking, phase, and env configuration. The gate-runner reads this to determine which gates to execute per phase.

utility_scripts.purpose: Orchestrates gate execution by phase
Stages named files, validates, and commits with an agent trailer
Creates and aggregates audit dispatch packages
Prevents phase finding counts from growing silently
End-to-end integration test runner
Framework version upgrade automation
Git pre-commit hook installation
Individual gate testing utility
Session state initialization
Records long-run autonomous session heartbeat evidence and updates session state
Runs scheduler-safe long-run autonomy loop ticks using supervisor and runner reports
Safely classifies and executes allowlisted long-run resume-plan commands while preserving model handoff steps
Plans or launches Codex/Claude runtime handoffs from long-run autonomy state
Detects stuck handoff loops, repeated failures, lease conflicts, blocked runners, and provider/session limits
Plans safe recovery actions for detected long-run autonomy failures without executing them automatically
Records evidence-backed resolution for long-run autonomy recovery-plan actions
Blocks autonomy scheduler ticks while recovery-plan actions lack matching resolution evidence
Generates dry-run-first shell, cron, launchd, and GitHub Actions autonomy scheduler profiles
Runs a disposable long-run autonomy smoke test through heartbeat, loop, adapter, validator, failure detector, recovery planner, recovery resolution, and scheduler guard
Plans the next long-run autonomy loop action and writes a resumable command plan
Shared run-lease guard for long-run autonomy loop and runtime handoff drivers
Validates long-run autonomy cadence, heartbeat, checkpoint, audit, and closeout policy
Detects local Codex/Claude runtime capabilities and orchestration limits
Testable parser and JSON writer for runtime capability detection
Generates VibOS Comp execution plans and worktree scope manifests from MISSION.md
Checks VibOS Comp work package evidence before integrated gauntlet execution
Generates VibOS Comp SCORECARD.md with normalized dimension pass/warn/fail results
Generates mission-aware VibOS Comp red-team findings and evidence report
Generates compact VibOS Comp evidence dossier for reviewer handoff
Validates VibOS Comp mission artifacts for AI-generated MVP failure modes
Validates VibOS Comp mission artifacts for primary user-flow integrity and objective fidelity context
Validates VibOS Comp mission artifacts for explicit system invariants
Validates VibOS Comp dependency decisions for current evidence, compatibility, lockfiles, audits, and upgrade paths
Validates VibOS Comp delivery infrastructure for CI/CD, deployment, observability, secrets, smoke checks, rollback, and runbook evidence
Source-cited local evidence recall index and query utility
Generates source-derived VibeOS inventory and public claim ledger for vNext proof packages
Production health probe (activate when URLs configured)
Production smoke test (activate when URLs configured)

wo_entry.description: Prerequisites check before starting any WO

pre_commit.description: Fast blocking checks before every commit

comp_gauntlet.description: VibOS Comp AI failure mode and enterprise MVP foundation checks

wo_exit.description: Combined backend + governance check after WO completion

full_audit.description: Comprehensive audit — all gates including compliance

session_end.description: Closure checks for bounded autonomous sessions

tiers.0: Always run — security and environment basics
tiers.1: Blocking — code quality, architecture, scope discipline
tiers.2: Important — compliance, dependencies, evidence (blocking configurable per project)
